title: perotis indica
intro: Perotis indica, commonly known as the Indian grass or Khas grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Perotis indica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Perotis indica is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
